title: aidia micrantha var. micrantha
intro: Aidia micrantha var. micrantha, also known as the small-leaved aidia, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aidia micrantha var. micrantha include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
